THE RIGHT PLACE FOR ONLINE TRADING ON FINANCIAL MARKETS

Get access to trade over 100 global trading assets. Everything you need for a top-tier trading experience including popular indicators and signals.

Create Account

About Us!

Nowadays cryptocurrency have become a global payment method, which can be used online. Crypto Trade Investments has been using this kind of digital payment for quite a while to gain and raise profit. Crypto Trade Investments, is an officially registered company which gives its clients all required guarantees, including confidentiality of data provided by clients at the registration procedure. Apart from this we guarantee accrual of requested payments in due time and full amount. The company's system, including support service, works 24 hours, which means you are always welcome to contact our experts in case you have any questions. Crypto Trade Investments, provides its clients with an opportunity to invest money into mining farms located all around the world to obtain quite a big income later, which can be done even without client's direct participation. The company actively uses trading bots on digital currency stock-markets, which is very convenient and profitable. We also try to attract new partners and share our experience with the like-minded people all over the world.

1. Cryptobot v2.0

The robot set up to trade with the most popular and used cryptocurrencies, based on MACD and RSI technical indicators. Up to 300% monthly.

3. Altcoins Combo

Autotrading occurs on all most popular altcoins. This algorithm proved its profitability thanks to risks diversifying among multiple trading assets.

2. Bitcoin Algo v2.1

Trade occurs with the most significant cryptocurrencies and is based on sophisticated technical analysis, taking into account

4. Encryption and Security

We protect your data with the latest security measures

OUR BEST INVESTMENTS

To Get Ahead With Big Smart Investments

1. OPEN AN ACCOUNT

Sign up and trade with the best crypto investment's platform in the industry with the highest payouts ever.....

2. FUND YOUR ACCOUNT

Use your credit card, Bitcoin, Ethereum, Litecoin and 15+ other altcoins to fund your account and get started

3. ENJOY YOUR FUNDS EVOLUTION

The trading experts goes to work automatically for you. Based on the pre-defined level of income you can double or even triple your result

4. WITHDRAWAL

Request withdrawal and receive money instanly
